entry.title: Re: When will prices for SQL Anywhere on the SAP Online Store be fixed?
entry.content: Are you looking for the client only?

entry.title: Re: Multiplication of colunm Sap Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
@priscilla_barbosa82 

Is there a way to multiply the values of a measure in a data action? -- Yes

What is not clear from your example is where you want to store the result of this multiplication. If you want to store on a equipment member called Total then you have to create the member first. What you have done is use variable members which are not stored and lost after script execution.

So either you can store the result on a new equipment called Total or on a new measure or a new Type. If not then you need to use # for dimensions at least.

Assuming you chose to store it on Measure

MEMBERSET [d/Measures] ="FDS"

MEMBERSET [d/EQIP] =("A","B","C")

DATA([d/Measures] = "Total",[d/EQUIP]="#",[d/Type]="#") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/EQIP] ="A",[d/Type]="PARALEL") * RESULTLOOKUP([d/EQIP] ="B",[d/Type]="PARALEL") * RESULTLOOKUP([d/EQIP] ="C",[d/Type]="SERIE")

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Decimal place in a calculated field in SAC
entry.content: Hi Nikhil, I found yhe solution , if you create a formula , save and want to change after then you cannot, formatting must be done in the same time

We have a requirement where we need to upload PDF files into BTP Document Management Service from Fiori App using below SAP Document Management Service API.

We have done all the set up for Service Instance and Destination but when we upload PDF file using File Uploader we pass below fields.

 

The problem is that the file that is placed in Repository is not opening it is just a file being placed in BTP.

Can someone help?

entry.title: Re: Multiplication of colunm Sap Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
First, thank you for the answer!

I store the result of this multiplication in another measure called FDMS (SERIE) and FDMP (PARALEL). The thing is the number of equipament is undefined.  So i need a multiplication for each type.

DATA([d/Measures] = "FDMS") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #TOTAL)

entry.title: Re: 1H 2025 Product Release - Deprecation of Canvas Repor...
entry.content:
Hello @lukaszkubiak -

   If you click the link to the blog that is included in that What's New Viewer entry, you'll see the current information.


At present, we've committed to an update in the second half of 2025 to customers around the transition plan and deletion of legacy report tools (Canvas, Table, and now Tiles & Dashboards).  This will then be updated to all customers via direct email notice, this blog will be updated, and the What's New Viewer entry will also be updated.  I hope this addresses your question.

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-and-customer-updates/retirement-of-canvas-table-tiles-dashboards-and-classic-report-types/ba-p/13619483 

Thanks!
Ben

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Cockpit integration suite with internal Server Error
entry.content: hello,

entry.title: Re: What is the use P type variable in ABAP?
entry.content:
Example: 

DATA result TYPE p LENGTH 14 DECIMALS 14.

In ABAP, a packed number (TYPE p) declared with LENGTH 14 means it occupies 14 bytes. The total number of decimal digits that can be stored is calculated as (2*Length – 1), which here gives 27 digits. With DECIMALS set to 14, the number has 27 – 14 = 13 digits before the decimal point. Therefore, the highest number possible is 9,999,999,999,999.99999999999999.

More on the topic here (ABAP Help).

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Cockpit integration suite with internal Server Error
entry.content:
hello, did anyone find the solution? or is it on SAP side problem?
I tried on chrome and edge, clearing cache didnt help

entry.title: How to add one Business Catalog into two Business Roles?
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

Please help us to know how we can authorize one catalog in two roles.

 

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to add one Business Catalog into two Business Roles?
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

Hope you're doing pretty well! 

In this case, you have two options: 

  1. Manually open each Business Role and include the Business Catalog. You can check the documentation SAP Help Portal | How to edit active Business Roles.

    OR 

  2. Use the mass update functionality. Check the documentation SAP Help Portal | How to Make Mass Changes to Business Roles.

 

Also, we have the "Leading Business Role" and "Derived Business Role" concept, in case you're not familiar.

It is useful if you need to create several business roles with common characteristics. You can define one business leading role and then derive other business roles from it. This leading role contains the basic settings such as access restrictions, the assigned business catalogs and common restrictions, such as General Accountant or General Planner. The values defined in the leading business role can’t be changed in the derived business role. You can, however, define additional values for the derived role. 

Check SAP Help Portal | How to Create Leading and Derived Business Roles for further information.

 

Kind regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: Use CRUD Opreations with SAP Datasphere Command-Line-Interface
entry.content:
Hey @Yash02 , unfortunately I do not have a sample JSON. The official SAP documentation provides information on creating replication Flows via CLI (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/d0ecd6f297ac40249072a44df0549c1a/6f5c65f209004751aa48f9682ee2ec45.html).

Yves

entry.title: BRF transports
entry.content:
Hi all,

I would like to read the BRF changes contained in a transport.

Sometimes transports are old and would like to check the contents before moving to production.

Here is the scenario:

1- I have a released transport TR1 with a BRF decision table DT1 changes.

2- I would like to export to Excel the BRF changes in DT1, contained in the transport,  before moving to production system

I tried workbench analysis, but it does not give the content. It only shows the changed objects.

I checked all FDT transport classes but was not able to get what i want.

Thanks a lot

entry.title: Learning metric
entry.content:
Estimado equipo,

Nos estamos comunicando con usted para comprender mejor cómo funciona la métrica de uso de aprendizaje. Nuestro cliente observa un uso excesivo de licencias, y los registros parecen estar vinculados a cursos realizados hace varios años.

Nos gustaría validar cómo se puede reducir el uso del aprendizaje, considerando que muchos usuarios ya no requieren acceso a los cursos comunitarios de SuccessFactors.

gracias de antemano

Atentamente

entry.title: Re: API Provider - Authentication type - Only two options
entry.content:
Even Cloud Integration doesn't support any JWT authentication out of the box for IFlows. Don't ask me why 🙂

And API Management is just passing through the calls to the backend and you can apply policies to interfere with the call. What you are looking at is only the authentication to the catalog service, not to the API provider itself. 

I believe you have to create policies to create a JWT token on API Management and enrich the call with it (see https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/json-web-tokens). Also for the Oauth authentication of the clients there are corresponding policies. 

By the way, this is the discussion section. It seems that the Q&A section has more engagement and is more suitable for questions, maybe you want to post the question there too: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/qa-p/technology-questions

entry.title: New font for Riyal symbol to be displayed in smartform
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement to display newly launched Riyal symbol in the print. I have downloaded .ttf file from 'https://github.com/emran-alhaddad/Saudi-Riyal-Font?tab=readme-ov-file'.

Then I uploaded the file using RSTXSF01 under the font name 'ZRIYAL' and used the font to create a character format in smartstyle. Then I used character format in smart form but the Riyal symbol is not coming. Whereas when I uploaded the same font in Windows and displayed the value 'E900' using  Alt + 'X' the Riyal symbol is displayed.

In smart form, the value is showing as 'E900' only. I am using device type ARSWIN (to display Arabic text).

Please suggest how to achieve the Riyal symbol.

entry.title: How can you work with in-process inspections in SAP Digital Manufacturing?
entry.content:
During production execution we want to do "sampling" quality inspections. These inspections are planned, For example, on thursday we want to 100% check all products on "assembly stop 3" for all data collection values.

I've read a lot about quality approval, inspection pass, special routings, data collections, assembly data, set points, visual inspections. but i cannot get a good sense how to configure this process. 

This looks pretty okay:

If i create a trigger for the completion of an SFC on an operation activity and start a special routing to start the quality process. How can I configure a check list with all the things to be checked by the quality employee? 

BTW: there is NO integration with ERP!!!

My main questions:

1. Trigger a quality employee to perform inspection on resource/operation/employee.

2. Provide quality employee with checklist

3. Make sure a product passes or fails an inspection.

entry.title: Access Control Concern Regarding Journal Entry Apps
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a question regarding the following apps: Verify General Journal Entries, Manage Journal Entries, and Post General Journal Entries.

For one of our customers, the intended process is that users should handle journal entries exclusively through the Verify General Journal Entries app. This approach is in place to ensure proper control and that approval workflows are followed before any postings are made.

However, we have identified that it is still possible to bypass this process.

Issue Identified:

  • The Manage Journal Entries app remains accessible through certain roles/catalogs
  • This app includes the "Create" function, which allows users to post journal entries directly—outside of the intended approval process.

Furthermore, the Post General Journal Entries app is also accessible via these roles/catalogs, enabling posting without prior verification.

This setup does not align with the defined access strategy for the customer and poses a risk of journal entries being posted without appropriate validation.

 

We have noted that the catalog SAP_FIN_BC_GL_CLOSING_PC cannot be removed, as it includes access to several apps that are actively used. However, the issue is that this catalog also grants access to the Manage Journal Entries app.

We would appreciate any guidance or recommendations on how to handle this situation while preserving access to the necessary apps.

entry.title: Re: Issue on Label Printing: the character 'O' (letter o) looks like a '0' (zero)
entry.content: @Sandra_Rossi I'm not really from technical so I was wondering how fonts are called within ABAP and how it is applied to the label command itself as an IPL language

entry.title: Re: Not possible to set the PO item returns indicator ret...
entry.content:
Hello Dipak,

enclosed you will find a short summary of the fields.

 

  1. low-cost

Meaning: The Low-cost field indicates that the costs of the respective purchase requisition process are classified as low. This often refers to the value of the purchase requisition or the amount of work required to process it.

Usage: You would use this field to identify requisitions that are low cost or low effort. It could help to process less critical requisitions faster, making the whole process more efficient.

 

  1. mdm-cost (master data management cost)

Meaning: The Mdm-cost field shows the costs incurred by master data management. These are the costs incurred for the maintenance and management of master data (such as supplier and article master data) used in the purchase requisition process.

Usage: This field is used to analyze how much costs are incurred under management of master data. These can be caused by the creation, maintenance, updating and cleansing of data. If these costs are high, this could indicate inefficient master data management processes that could be optimized.

 

  1. high-cost

Meaning: The High-cost field indicates that the costs of the purchase requisition process are classified as high. This can be caused by high values of the purchase requisition or by more complex processes that require more time and effort.

Usage: This field is useful for identifying requisitions that require special attention due to their high cost or effort. These may be expensive items or purchase requisitions with more complicated approval processes. A detailed analysis of these requisitions can help improve efficiency or identify expensive processes that should be optimized.

 

Best regards

Dennis

entry.title: Re: Cleared in the meantime"error message
entry.content:
Hi Pyae,

I don't know if you still have this issue, but something that help me with this balance error was passing two documents for clearing, an invoice(RE) and a vendor payment(KZ). Check if you are passing two documents, and the sum of both documents should balance 0.00.

Kind Regards,

Marcelo R.

entry.title: Error Handling in SAP BPA Processes | How Should I Handle Build Process Errors?
entry.content:
Hello Builders,

During my recent builds in SAP Process Automation I have noticed there are considerably fewer resources for error handling in "processes" than in "automations." On the automations side there is a sub flow tab that allows you to pass on error details with additional flow steps. For example, you can add a notification form for your user containing the current error, allowing the automation to fail gracefully.

I currently have a process that contains an API Action that posts to an external service. When this Action fails it ends the process completely and does not pass outputs to any subsequent process steps. I can see the error in the monitoring tab but the end user, obviously, will not. How do you follow design principles in SAP BPA processes?

I searched the community and product documentation on this subject but could only find answers related to the "automation" side.

Any recommendations, guidance, or links to resources would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance,

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Re: LFM1 change fields definition
entry.content: Already discussed and solution given here

entry.title: Re: Fixed asset valuation - 0L and 2L ledgers both need t...
entry.content:
Hola Gabor5

I invite you to read the Asset Accounting documentation on the SAP Help Portal. I will share the links that answer your questions.

My questions are:

  • Do we need to fill in both ledgers? What happens if we don't?

Every time you run the depreciation at the end of the month, you select the ledger and the system automatically calculates those values based on the rules of each depreciation area. The system will create the journal entries for the corresponding depreciation areas.

  • What is the difference between these ledgers in this context?

When your SAP System was configured, the company decided to use 2 ledgers - one for Local purposes (ledger 2L) and the other to use the IFRS rules (Ledger 0L). 

However, each ledger has different depreciation rules predefined by country to meet various requirements, so you see more than one.

Find more details of the Manage Fixed Asset in this SAP Help Portal Link

  • Is there a best practice or recommendation for which valuation areas should be maintained, and which ones can be left alone if unused?

As I mentioned, the depreciation amount for this valuation areas are calculated automatically. You cannot deactive it and you cannot change predefined depreciation keys.

  • Why does Ledger 2L appear multiple times with different depreciation areas (15, 16, 32)?

Each depreciation area has different depreciation rules and it is use for different purposes, you can see the names:

  • 15 - Local Tax
  • 16 - Customer specific use
  • 32 - Book depreciation

I highly recommend you discuss this topic with your the Company's Accounting Department.

 

Best regards.

Edna

entry.title: BAS service missing in BTP subaccount entitlements
entry.content: In the global account, I created a sub-account with Сloud Foundry, but when trying to add BAS to the account's entitlements, there is no option to select Busines Application Studio (screenshot below). What could be the reason?

entry.title: Re: SFTP using Rise with SAP( no PI )
entry.content: Another option is to use the AWS SDK for SAP ABAP which lets you send and receive files via SFTP using Amazon S3 and AWS Transfer Family.  This solution is pure ABAP and requires no OS-level configuration.  Here's a blog which describes inbound and outbound scenarios: https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/awsforsap/secure-file-transfer-with-the-aws-sdk-for-sap-abap/

entry.title: LRN-191759 For this notification, is it triggered by the manager or just an overdue notification?
entry.content: LRN-191759 says "When this option is selected, overdue training reminders will not be sent to the recipient using the manager's email, but will use the Application Notification User Email instead." However, it does not indicate what is triggering the email. If this is a standard overdue notification, I would want the From email to be the application notification user email. If this is a notification triggered by the supervisor, I would want the from email to be the supervisor's. The documentation isn't clear.

entry.title: Re: When will prices for SQL Anywhere on the SAP Online Store be fixed?
entry.content: Thanks for helping, Chris. By "client only", do you mean the "remote database client"? As far as we're concerned, it could be either that or either of the two Edge edition offerings. It depends what we need for a particular customer. My concern now is that, if we have a customer needing SQL Anywhere licensing, we can't send them to the SQL Anywhere store because the pricing does not look right. We could have a need to do this at any time, and we don't want to have to tell our customers that we can't go ahead yet.

entry.title: Re: A Complete Tutorial on OData-Based Adobe Forms for SAP Purchase Orders
Upgrading sap_java_buildpack to sap_java_buildpack_jakarta
entry.content:
Hello Friends,

My issue is while trying to upgrade the java build pack from sap_java_buildpack to sap_java_buildpack_jakarta, we are also upgrading our JDK version to 21.

So i changed buildpack specified in manifest.yml file to sap_java_buildpack_jakarta

 

And changed in buildpack specified in mta.yaml file to sap_java_buildpack_jakarta

 

After compiling my code with Java 21, I deployed a simple HelloWorld servlet to Cloud Foundry. However, upon executing the endpoint, I received a "not found" error. I subsequently reviewed the subaccount-level logs for further insights.

"xxxx/Test has been compiled by a more recent version of the Java Runtime (class file version 65.0), this version of the Java Runtime only recognizes class file versions up to 61.0 (unable to load class [xxxx.test.Test])","stacktrace":["java.lang.UnsupportedClassVersionError: xxxx/test/Test has been compiled by a more recent version of the Java Runtime (class file version 65.0), this version of the Java Runtime only recognizes class file versions up to 61.0 (unable to load class [xxxx.test.Test])"

It clearly giving JRE will accept only version 17 only, but my organization has asked to upgrade to Java 21.

I referred this sap help document for upgrading Java to 21
https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/sapmachine

SAP mentioned to add below environment variables into manifest.yaml file

 

if I add and deploy also its giving same error

This my pom.xml file

Where can i verfiy if the version that I am using is not included with the vulnerability?

entry.title: SAP UI5: Error Binding DatePicker Controls and Filtering with OData Model
entry.content:
Problem Description: I am facing an issue where I am unable to properly bind DatePicker controls in an SAP UI5 fragment and use them for filtering an OData model. Specifically, when I try to retrieve values from the DatePicker controls and apply filters to the OData model, I encounter the error sap.m.MessageToast.show("DatePicker controls are not available."); This error suggests that the DatePicker controls are not accessible, but they are part of the opened fragment.

Scenario: I have a fragment that includes two DatePicker controls (DPFrom and DPTo), and I want to use them for filtering records based on a date range (ALERTE_CRE_DATE) from an OData model. The error occurs when trying to access the DatePicker values in the controller. you should know that the fragment is opend

Here’s a part of the relevant code I’m working with: 

<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core">
    <Dialog
        id="helloWorldDialog"
        title="Date Selection"
        class="sapUiResponsivePadding"
        resizable="true"
        stretchOnPhone="true"
        afterClose="onDialogClose">
        
        <Panel
            id="datePanel"
            width="auto">
            
            <!-- 'From' DatePicker -->
            <Label text="From:" labelFor="DPFrom"/>
            <DatePicker
                id="DPFrom"
                placeholder="Enter From Date..."
                change="handleChangeFrom"
                class="sapUiSmallMarginBottom"/>

            <!-- 'To' DatePicker -->
            <Label text="To:" labelFor="DPTo"/>
            <DatePicker
                id="DPTo"
                placeholder="Enter To Date..."
                change="handleChangeTo"
                class="sapUiSmallMarginBottom"/>
         
            <FlexBox
                height="30px"
                alignItems="End"
                justifyContent="End">
                <items>
                    <Button text="Select" press="onSelectPress" type="Emphasized" class="sapUiSmallMarginEnd" />
                    <Button text="Cancel" press="onCancelPress" class="sapUiTinyMarginEnd" />
                </items>
            </FlexBox>
        </Panel>
    </Dialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>
onhandleDate: function(oEvent) {
    var that = this;
    if (!this._valueHelpDialogDate) {
        this._valueHelpDialogDate = sap.ui.xmlfragment("DateFilter", "com.faurecia.stockMonitorCatalog.view.ValueHelpDialogDate", this);
        this.getView().addDependent(this._valueHelpDialogDate); // Ensures the fragment is added as a dependent
    }
    this._valueHelpDialogDate.open();
},

onSelectPress: function(oEvent) {
    var oFromDate = this.byId("DPFrom");
    var oToDate = this.byId("DPTo");

    // Check if the DatePicker controls are available
    if (!oFromDate || !oToDate) {
        sap.m.MessageToast.show("DatePicker controls are not available.");
        return;
    }

    var fromDateValue = oFromDate.getDateValue();
    var toDateValue = oToDate.getDateValue();

    if (fromDateValue && toDateValue) {
        // Create filters for the OData model
        var aFilters = [
            new sap.ui.model.Filter("ALERTE_CRE_DATE", sap.ui.model.FilterOperator.GE, fromDateValue),
            new sap.ui.model.Filter("ALERTE_CRE_DATE", sap.ui.model.FilterOperator.LE, toDateValue)
        ];

        // Apply filters to the OData model and read data
        var oModel = this.getView().getModel("listModel");
        oModel.read("/StockDataSet", {
            filters: aFilters,
            success: function(oData) {
                // Update the model with the filtered data
                var oFilteredModel = new sap.ui.model.json.JSONModel(oData.results);
                this.getView().setModel(oFilteredModel, "filteredModel");

                // Close the DatePicker dialog
                this._valueHelpDialogDate.close();
            }.bind(this),  // Bind the correct context
            error: function() {
                sap.m.MessageToast.show("Error occurred while fetching data.");
            }
        });
    } else {
        sap.m.MessageToast.show("Please select both 'From' and 'To' dates.");
    }
}

entry.title: 'Generate Mappings' or AI-functionality for emission factor mapping still not working in SAP SFM
entry.content:
Hello All,

is there a problem to read Emission factors related to the HS-Code of products from the Ecoinvest-LCA-database from the SAP Store ?

We have several examples in our SFM system, where the Mapping-tool is not able read useful emissions factors from Ecoinvest-DB:

Does anybody have an idea what I'm doing wrong and what could cause this error? 

Thanks for any help & kind regards,

Edgar

entry.title: Re: HANA ODBC Test Connection Error
entry.content: Hi Matija, thank you very much. This seems to have resolved a first issue. I will now update the original question.

entry.title: Re: When will prices for SQL Anywhere on the SAP Online Store be fixed?
entry.content: client connection to a running server (i.e. client-server connection) where only the client connectivity is required.

entry.title: Guidance Required on Deletion or Retention of Component DMIS_CNT 2011_1_731 During Upgrade
entry.content:
During planning an upgrade project for SAP system you have identified that the component DMIS_CNT 2011_1_731 is installed in your landscape. As part of the upgrade, you want to confirm whether this component can be safely deleted or should be retained.

  1. Whether DMIS_CNT 2011_1_731 is still required for the upgraded system?

  2. If it is obsolete or deprecated, what is the recommended procedure for safely removing it?

  3. If it must be retained, are there any prerequisites or compatibility notes we should be aware of?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Guidance Required on Deletion or Retention of Compone...
entry.content:
As per below SAP Notes :

2203365 - Uninstalling DMIS 2011_1_7xx / DMIS 2018_1_752

1577442 - Installation and delta upgrade of DMIS_CNT 2011_1

DMIS_CNT cannot be uninstalled.

Please be aware that there is no general DMIS deinstallation available.  

The deinstallation is also not possible of the following components:

  • DMIS 2010, DMIS 2006
  • DMIS_CNT 2011, DMIS_CNT 2006
  • DMIS_EXT
  • SAP TDMS EXT BPL 3.0
  • DMIS_BSC
  • DMIS_MOB
  • DMIS_HR
  • NMI_CONT

 

. Prerequisites for Installing DMIS_CNT 2011_1

  • You cannot uninstall DMIS_CNT.
    Before you install DMIS_CNT, note that it is not possible to uninstall ABAP add-ons. Further restrictions concerning the upgrade and maintenance of your SAP system that are caused by the installation of an add-on are described in release strategy note 1231203.

Few customers have tried uninstalling from SAINT but it shows dependency with other BASIS objects in higher release.

Hence, it corrupts the system.

entry.title: Re: CR reports cannot connect to SQL Server database
entry.content: We are the developers of FosterTrak. Let me clarify the issue. FT app and reports run fine. The issue is with the CR designer that is integrated with VS 2022. When I select Database Expert and go to the Links tab, the data tables do not show up and no linking can take place. I down loaded the CR 2025 but I guess I need a product key and there seems not to be a trial version.

entry.title: Request for SAP CodeJam Event in the day before of the SAP Inside Track Porto 2025
entry.content:
Hello,

The SAP Inside Track Porto will have its second edition in Porto(Portugal) on September 27, 2025.

Taking the opportunity we would like to have a Code Jam event in the day before it, on September 26, 2025.

We are open to have any of the below topics:

  • Build AI services using the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model, SAP AI Core and SAP generative AI Hub
  • SAP Build CodeJam - Event-Driven Processes
  • ABAP Cloud & ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
  • Managing APIs in your landscape with SAP API Management
  • Event-driven integrations with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Trial Account Creation and Enabling Integration Suite service(SAP CPI)
entry.content:
Between the SAP lesson support and this blog, and a couple weeks later I finally got the "Design" menu options to show. All this should be in the Lesson. Now I am missing the Configuration menu option but I added PIManagement.Selfservice.Administrator as someone mentioned above, because I got over tired of getting to a new section of the lesson and a role was needed, so I just added them all! But its still missing Configure even after clearing browser cache, which is later in the lesson here.
😕 

UPDATE. Logged out a while later and back in and I can now see Configure!

entry.title: Re: When will prices for SQL Anywhere on the SAP Online Store be fixed?

entry.title: Data Attribute Recommendation - 500 Internal Server Error when Inferencing
entry.content:
When inferencing from a model via the Data Attribute Recommendation API I receive a 500 Internal Server Error.

 

However the model trained correctly and is deployed.

 

Is there any way to get additional serverside information that could be helpful in debugging this issue?

entry.title: Re: When will prices for SQL Anywhere on the SAP Online Store be fixed?
entry.content: Was curious if you were discussing the client for SQLA, not SQLA remote server (SAP SQL Anywhere, remote database client). The prices have been checked and are correct.

entry.title: Re: How we can Generate / Trigger XML when Saving Freight Order from SAP TM to Third Party system
entry.content:
@sanjoybiswas, try these steps to trigger SEND_TOR when a critical date change occurs. Then you can adapt to accommodate other scenarios.

1) Configure a condition with type /SCMTMS/CC_DATE_TOL which will identify critical date changes.

2) Assign this to your freight document type in section Change Controller Settings, field Date Tolerance Condition.

3) Create a process controller strategy which includes method SEND_TOR. See Process Controller config under TM Basic Functions.

4) Create a chaco determination condition (type /SCMTMS/CC_TOR_STRAT). In the data access definition, add a column with the predefined DAD /SCMTMS/TOR_DATE_UPD, which will contain the result of your earlier date tolerance check (critical change, non-critical change, no change). Maintain a row in the condition table to trigger the new strategy with SEND_TOR for appropriate scenarios when a critical date change has occurred.

5) Assign the chaco condition to your freight document type under Change Controller Settings, field Change Strategy Determination Cond.

entry.title: Re: When will prices for SQL Anywhere on the SAP Online Store be fixed?
entry.content: client=seat=connection

entry.title: Re: Datasphere performance issue
entry.content: Hey there :). Just wondering, did you try to persist the final COPA View?

entry.title: Payload shouldn't delivered to the rest api
entry.content: From po we are calling rest api dynamically by using patren variable replacement, and we are getting response as well, but api provider is asking not to send any payload in the body of the message.

entry.title: Re: BTE or substitution does not work druing FB70 simulation
entry.content: 1399674 - ENJOY/FB01: No substitution for event 3 during simulation

entry.title: Can I add custom tab into WBS Element for transaction CJ91/CJ92 in S4 Hana?
entry.content:
Please suggest, how to add custom tab into WBS Element for transaction CJ91/CJ92 in SAP S/4HANA 2023?

or let me know if it is feasible in SAP S/4HANA 2023?

as per my knowledge Fiori approach, the recommended and upgrade-safe method to add a custom tab or fields to the WBS Element (CJ93 equivalent) is through In-App

Extensibility using the "Custom Fields and Logic "Fiori app.

For GUI Screen, Classical enhancement like CNEX007 is still required.

and in the Enhancement CNEX007. FM - EXIT_SAPLCJWB_001 is not available in the S/4HANA 2023.

Please suggest the solution.

Thanks,

Priyanka Soni

entry.title: Re: Configuration: SAP Business Network SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authenticati
entry.content: thanks @Milen33 , I was under the impression that the sp= param in the URL we maintain on our side had to match precisely the application name given in IAS. Good to know it works with passing the remoteLogin url in the sp= parameter and that solves this issue with the buyer url sent in notifications.

entry.title: Re: The OData or EDMX specification file was not found at...
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for your response!

Regarding the resource path: I'm actually using / in the "Path" field to list and explore all available services. When I try to test a specific service using the full path like /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OData_Service_Name>, I still get the same error:

"The OData or EDMX specification file was not found at the destination."

I’ve double-checked the Cloud Connector mapping and the backend system, and everything seems to be in place.

Any idea what else could be causing this issue?

Thanks again for your support!

entry.title: Re: US Form I-9 Concepts for SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0

entry.title: asset 'year-end' value is not equal to the next year ‘Fiscal year start ’value
entry.content: Dear Expects, We found: The Asset of ‘year-end value’ is not equal to the next year ‘Fiscal year start ’value. Asset 1032056154 2024 year-end value is 3,606,942.53, please see the under picture . But the same asset 2025 Fiscal year start is 4,358,626.56,so the asset 2024 Year-end value is not equal 2025 Fiscal year start , how to solve to the problem ,thanks! In addition we want to know how to check other asset , and avoid the same problem. Supp: We had been executed（AJAB） Year-End Closing successfully thanks! Jordan

entry.title: Re: DataSphere Malfunction: Blank Page in Preview Model
entry.content: Hey there :). Where is your hierarchy? Econimica Dimension? Can you post a screen shot from there/the hierarchy? Also FACT1 and FACT2 seem identical, or do I miss something? Also please post a screen shot of the model dimensions (not the model-view).

entry.title: Re: Delta extraction is not working in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: Hey there, how do you fetch the data? replication flow listening? ODQ? CDS delta is supported and working properly.

entry.title: Re: Footer must be bottom of every page in reward statement
entry.content:
Hi @SF_Abhisek 

I checked with our custom reporting expert and it's not possible.

"not possible. Unless the pages are fixed. pdf outputs don't acknowledge the footer tags. they're using a br tags which works but won't work in all scenarios if the page is dynamic."

 

All the best,
Xavier

 

@SF_Abhisek

entry.title: UI.DataFieldForIntentBasedNavigation does not navigate to selected Sales Document
entry.content:
I am using the below annotation in a UI.LineItem annotation (i.e., a table). The annotation below is creating a button, that when clicked, navigates to the app with the semantic object of SalesContract with the action of change, which is the Change Contract - VA42 app. The RequiresContext allows me to select a row before navigating to it, which should select the SalesDocument I wish to navigate to, however, whenever I click on a row, and then hit the "Change Contract" button created by this annotation, it always navigates to one specific SalesDocument, regardless of which row I selected. Does anyone know how I would fix this issue?

<Record Type="UI.DataFieldForIntentBasedNavigation">
    <PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Change Contract"/>
    <PropertyValue Property="SemanticObject" String="SalesContract"/>
    <PropertyValue Property="Action" String="change"/>
    <PropertyValue Property="RequiresContext" Bool="true"/>
</Record>

entry.title: Re: Which table stores the flexible workflow steps information
entry.content: See the table to have all step of Wkflw in table SWDSMNODES with MOMDELEMENT = S (as Step) with WFDI_ID = Workflow ID

entry.title: Re: Can i connect to two different sap s4 hana public clo...
entry.content: Hey there, the connection name is S/4, or BW, or ... this is a defined name in the wizard and cannot be changed. You can change the underlying connection parameters however. So switch from one to another, but not both I fear.

entry.title: Re: due date for credit memos FKK_CREATE_DOC
entry.content: Credit terms are applied for any credit posting.  They are mapped to your FICA payment term and applied at creation.

entry.title: Re: How can we highlight New or Featured trainings more p...
entry.content:
Hi @Sang1 

As per the KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3511497/E , the Featured tile is not present at the New Learning Experience homepage.

But it's possible to use a filter through the Enhanced Search to find the Featured, New, and Revised items.

More details in the below links:

  • https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-learning/managing-sap-successfactors-learning-for-administrators/placing-courses-into-featured-new-and-revised-card-categories
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-q-a/feature-tile/qaq-p/12699791

Best regards,
